framework.name: MCP Dynamic Authorization Discovery
framework.description: A protocol flow where agents discover authorization requirements on-the-fly: agent requests resource → receives 401 with discovery link → discovers auth server and required scopes → initiates OAuth 2.1 flow with PKCE → receives token → accesses resource. Enables agents to interact with thousands of unknown APIs without pre-configuration.
framework.raw_quote: Agent makes initial request to MCP server, Server responds with 401 Unauthorized, providing a discovery link, Agent discovers the authorization server and required scopes, Agent initiates OAuth 2.1 authorization code flow with PKCE
